MINI MINUTES FOR APR-13-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC AND PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS, LLC'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED, AND JUDGMENT WAS GRANTED IN DEFENDANTS' FAVOR ON MARCH 12, 2015. HOWEVER, THE COURT FINDS THAT $4582.50 IS NOT A REASONABLE FEE FOR BRINGING THE MOTION. THE COURT AWARDS $1000 IN FEES AND COSTS INSTEAD, AS A REASONABLE FEE FOR THE BRINGING THE MOTION, GIVEN THE JUDGMENT IN DEFENDANTS' FAVOR. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTs 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC and PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS, LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs is GRANTED. No opposition was filed, and judgment was granted in Defendants' favor on March 12, 2015. However, the Court finds that $4582.50 is not a reasonable fee for bringing the motion. The Court awards $1000 in fees and costs instead, as a reasonable fee for the bringing the motion, given the judgment in Defendants' favor. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Continued To May-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Atty. Patrick Connolly of U&L, (415)357-0600, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party 744 Union Partners. Atty. Richard Frick of Asher & Associates appearing by telephonic appearance, 714-638-4300, for Defendant and moving party 744 Union Investors.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:DEFENDANT 744 UNION INVESTORS AND PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Court Reporter: Lucy Carrill0-Grubbs, CSR: 6766, (650)827-0769

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ralph Ascher, Esq. of Ascher & Associates, P.C., (714-638-4300), for 744 Union Investors, LLC, Defendants and moving parties.
No other appearances.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC and PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, moot. First Amended Complaint shall be filed no later than December 30, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
